title: I already have IronOre's stats from the last pull. Grabbing the other three now.

turns.agentText:
I already have IronOre's stats from the last pull. Grabbing the other three now.

{{figure}}

**IronOre.7826** — 61/332 all-time (**18%**), rocketed to 18/25 recently (**72%**). The biggest upward trend we've seen — historically a very occasional raider who has become one of the more reliable faces in the last six weeks. Plays Druid, Firebrand, Berserker, Troubadour — all support-leaning with 153M healing and almost no damage to speak of.

**pinguinox.9528** — 227/332 all-time (**68%**), down to 13/25 recently (**52%**). Veteran attendance dipping, similar to VincentCross. Absurd profession breadth — 17 different specs including Ritualist, Antiquary, Luminary, Paragon. Broadly a flex DPS/support player.

**Sselnoisiv.6130** — 169/332 all-time (**51%**), holding at 13/25 recently (**52%**). The most consistent of the four — no drift at all, just steady half-the-raids attendance. Pure Druid, every single run, 334M healing total. One-trick but very committed to that trick.

**MaximDeathgun.8614** — 29/332 all-time (**9%**), up to 7/25 recently (**28%**). New or returning player who's clearly been showing up more lately — all-time is low because they're relatively new to the roster. 15 professions already logged, leaning into newer specs (Antiquary, Ritualist, Amalgam, Holosmith).

---

**Pattern across everyone we've looked at:** The guild has a clear core of 7–8 players who are at 70%+ and barely miss anything (harasho, Arx, Oceanomega, Sunny, hotep, WindNature, Wisdom, BreakN, VincentCross). Then a second tier at 50–70% (pinguinox, Sselnoisiv, Grimmster, Vettexl, sbr) and a longer tail of newer or night-specific players trending upward (IronOre, MaximDeathgun, Ashton, Stan, Kamoidra).
